summary: Forward systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES on the R2 topology client implementation. The architecture review accepts the anti-fake-line decision and default path move away from M2 grid, but requires visible route nodes in the browser renderer, stronger screenshot evidence, and a real projection-level geometry perturbation test before QA.

required_changes.required_change: Render existing topology route-node anchors in the browser Pixi renderer from the existing MapAnchorRenderInstruction/read-model surface. Add data-anchor-count or equivalent test evidence. Anchor rendering must stay non-authoritative and must not infer routes or reachability from anchor positions.

Regenerate 1440x900 and 1280x720 evidence after route-node rendering. The default visible map must show irregular district polygons, route-node markers, explicit route 24, selected/control/action affordances, and no rectangular, hex, or regular-lattice board. Screenshot-only styling may frame the map but must not fake semantics.

Strengthen the perturbation test by exercising projectM7TopologyClientReadModels with a perturbed topology DTO and the same accepted path-preview DTOs, then assert unchanged path preview edge sequences/reason codes, drawable route ids, route-source count, and district-endpoint non-drawing.

accepted_decisions_to_keep: Keep the default player path on createBootstrappedShellSnapshot -> createM7TopologyClientReadModelSnapshot -> accepted topology/path preview DTO projection.
Keep legacy M2_PROTOTYPE_GRID_COLUMNS off the default player path.
Keep the no-fake-line rule: do not draw district endpoint legs from centroid, bbox, nearest-neighbor, district anchor, or visual adjacency.
Keep route 24 as the only drawable route unless another accepted topology route has explicit route-node/polyline points inside the allowed current DTO surface.
Do not modify protocol/schema/sim-core/save/content-source/gate docs for this task.
